step_rationale: MI susceptibility gene; likely inflammatory or immune-modulation role in plaque destabilization.
mechanism: LGALS2 is a susceptibility locus for myocardial infarction, potentially mediating immune-inflammatory mechanisms in plaque biology.

references.title: Molecular genetics of coronary artery disease.
[Genetic background of acute coronary syndrome].
references.journal: Nihon rinsho. Japanese journal of clinical medicine
